title: Better FPS & Visuals Boost FPS
description: A Modpack that improves your performance and visuals as highest possible
body:
Are tired of old minecraft vanilla? do you want to play minecraft and feel enjoyable? me to :)
Because of this i design this modpack so we can play Hours of minecraft and not got bored for lag and old visuals



# why Better FPS?


Better FPS is not only improves your performance and visuals as highest possible, but adds more than +100 features to your game to make your playing enjoyable

best part is it's all client_side and achieved without majorly changing the core game,so you can use it on any server you like without getting any issues.


i recommend to install version [1.20.1](https://modrinth.com/modpack/better-fps-visuals/version/1.0.0) Because pack are complete but other version mods not update yet and some features does not have

![Visual Improvement](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/afe0e96e0d260d61719fc2f77747c9968f1a043a.png)
-  [ FreshAnimations installed](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)
-  [Smooth Swapping](https://modrinth.com/mod/smooth-swapping)
-  [Leaves falling animation](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingleaves)
-  [shaders suppurted](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)
- [More player animation](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations)
- [Remove Reloading Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/rrls)
- [Dynamic Lights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights)
- [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map)
- [3D skin layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers)
- [Wavey Capes](https://modrinth.com/mod/wavey-capes)
- [Better Third Person](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-third-person)
- and moree...


![Extra Vanilla option](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03f1bbec72f4565e34e0a65761fc4ab3e320261f.png)

- [See further than the servers render distance](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby)
- [Easily swap items without opening the inventory](https://modrinth.com/plugin/itemswapper)
- [Inventory Sorting](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-profiles-next)
- [Improved mouse dragging mechanics](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks)
- [Crafting Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/crafting-tweaks)
- [Zoom Button](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify)
- [Click through signs](https://modrinth.com/mod/clickthrough)
- and more
  
![Other features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f4efc1e5900a0d281f58c2ec20acd9bbb23864a.png)

- All Optifine  Features support
- Download resourcepacks
- [Customizable Cape](https://modrinth.com/mod/capes)
- Download Vanilla Tweak resourcepacks
- [Never clear caht history](https://modrinth.com/mod/morechathistory)
- [EasierVillagerTrading](https://modrinth.com/mod/easiervillagertrading)

this modpack already has some resourcepacks and shaders to make minecraft a little differen, if you don't like it you can disable it on menu,i hope you enjoy the packs



if have any Question and suggest  feel free to message me on my Discord server :click here
